# Copilot Instructions — aiframework

> Make [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) understand your project instantly

Stack: bash / none

## Commands

- Test: `make test`
- Lint: `find . -name '*.sh' -not -path '*/.git/*' -not -path '*/vault/*' | xargs shellcheck`

## Rules

- Never commit secrets or credentials
- Run lint + test before committing
- All scripts must pass shellcheck with zero warnings
- All scripts must start with set -euo pipefail for strict error handling
- All user-supplied variables must be quoted — no unquoted $VAR expansions

---
*Generated by aiframework.*

<!-- BEGIN SHEAL INTEGRATION -->
## Self-Healing Workflow

Run `sheal check` at the start of every session to catch environment issues early.
Run `sheal retro` at the end of sessions to extract learnings (requires Entire.io).

### Session Learnings

Learnings are managed as ADR-style files. Run `sheal learn list` to view them.
- Add: `sheal learn add "insight" --tags=foo,bar`
- Sync from global: `sheal learn sync`
- See `.sheal/learnings/` for project-specific learnings
<!-- END SHEAL INTEGRATION -->
